overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game featuring an astronaut in a spacesuit exploring a derelict industrial space station. The clip shows the character moving from a green-lit control corridor into a red-lit medical bay containing a body, with environmental hazards appearing at the end.

events.description: character turns away from control panel and begins walking toward the doorway

agents.ego_description: examining a control panel interface then turning to proceed down the corridor

entered.detail: wall-mounted terminal with illuminated screen displaying red and blue buttons
large yellow and black mechanical wheel for sealing doors
metal grate panels covering the walls and ceiling
yellow and black wheel or tire resting on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow green-lit corridor examining a control panel, then turns right and begins walking toward a distant doorway. The environment features industrial wire mesh walls and a large mechanical airlock wheel.

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from green to red as character approaches the doorway
character passes through doorway into the adjacent room

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor and passing through the doorway into the adjacent room

entered.detail: open doorway emitting red emergency lighting from the adjacent room

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the corridor toward a doorway bathed in red light. The lighting transitions from green to red as the character approaches and passes through the doorway into the next room.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict medical bay with examination table

events.description: character stops at the medical table to examine the body
thick black cables or tentacles suddenly drop from the ceiling

agents.ego_description: approaching the medical table to examine a dead body, then observing tentacles descending from above

notable_agents.action: dead body lying on medical examination table

entered.detail: white metal table with a body lying on top
humanoid corpse in a spacesuit lying on the examination table
scattered rubble and trash accumulated on the floor
tall storage cabinets against the right wall
thick black cables or organic tentacles hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a red-lit medical bay and approaches an examination table holding a dead body. After examining the body, thick black tentacles suddenly drop from the ceiling, creating an environmental hazard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, green-lit industrial corridor into a menacing, red-lit medical bay. It begins with the character examining a control panel beside wire mesh walls and a mechanical airlock wheel before turning right to walk toward a distant doorway. As the character advances, the ambient lighting shifts from a cold green to a deep, oppressive red upon passing through the threshold. The scene then opens into a medical bay where the camera approaches an examination table holding a dead body. Finally, the stillness is broken as thick black tentacles suddenly drop from the ceiling to surround the character.
